body:
In St Barts
Dave is in PB hooking tv and computer - cable people won't come to the house before 2 nd to hook up boxes so I asked janus to get boxes and dave will try to set it up them selves - he thinks he might be able to. Some of the lamps don't have shades - have asked Marcus to get them..am waiting for confirmation on rest of order and will let you know when I hear




Thx
